home.title: Insight
home.subtitle: Your comprehensive hub for oracle analytics and comparison tools. Explore leading oracle solutions, analyze performance across blockchains, and make data-driven decisions.
home.aboutDescription: Insight provides comprehensive tools to analyze and compare leading oracle solutions including Chainlink, Band Protocol, UMA, Pyth Network, and API3. Explore cross-oracle and cross-chain comparisons, view detailed price data, and make informed decisions about oracle integration.
home.builtWith: Built with modern technologies, designed for developers and analysts in the Web3 space.

chainlink.title: Chainlink
chainlink.subtitle: Decentralized Oracle Network
chainlink.decentralizedNodesDesc: Distributed network of independent node operators ensuring no single point of failure.
chainlink.reputationSystemDesc: Transparent reputation scoring for node operators based on performance and reliability.
chainlink.securityFirstDesc: Battle-tested infrastructure with multiple security layers and audit processes.
chainlink.multiChainSupportDesc: Connects to 20+ blockchains including Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, and more.

bandProtocol.title: Band Protocol
bandProtocol.subtitle: Cross-chain data oracle platform built on Cosmos SDK

features.crossChainOracleDesc: Seamlessly connects and delivers data across multiple blockchain networks with high reliability.
features.dataSourcesDesc: Aggregates data from multiple premium sources including exchanges, APIs, and enterprise providers.
features.cosmosSdkIntegrationDesc: Built on Cosmos SDK, enabling fast finality, high throughput, and native interoperability.

uma.title: UMA
uma.subtitle: The Optimistic Oracle Protocol - Build priceless synthetic assets and financial contracts

features.optimisticOracleDesc: Decentralized dispute resolution system that allows users to request price data with economic guarantees.
features.pricelessContractsDesc: Contracts that don't rely on on-chain price feeds, using off-chain data instead.
features.financialContractsDesc: Create synthetic assets, derivatives, and other financial products on any blockchain.
features.dataVerificationDesc: Robust system for verifying and disputing data using economic incentives.

pythNetwork.title: Pyth Network
pythNetwork.subtitle: High-frequency financial data oracle with first-party exchange data and sub-second latency.

api3.title: API3
api3.subtitle: Decentralized API solutions for smart contracts

features.firstPartyOraclesDesc: Direct data delivery from API providers, eliminating middlemen and reducing trust assumptions
features.airnodeDesc: Lightweight, serverless oracle node that allows API providers to easily deploy oracles without maintaining infrastructure
features.decentralizedApiConnectivityDesc: Trustless, decentralized API connectivity enabling smart contracts to securely interact with external data sources
features.quantifiableSecurityDesc: On-chain security guarantees with transparent, auditable security parameters and quantifiable risk assessments
